LAB EXPERIMENT 04

Library of Chaos.

Generate completely custom, overpowered Minecraft items. Powered by a massive database of 10,000+ illegal NBT blueprints, dynamically customized by AI.

Help grow the Library of Chaos! Upload your own highly-customized or illegal `.nbt` files. We will extract the exact data structure to train the AI.

> Ready.
